form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 8th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 45 m by Folsom Prison (1:52.30) in 15000?CL on March 20 at $80.20. Before that 7th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 20 m by Montana Chief (1:55.10) in 15000?CL on March 13 at $39. Improvement required to threaten in this field.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 45 m by Martz Jak (1:54.10) in 15000?CL on March 27 at $54.80. Before that, 7th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 35 m by Ponda Executive (1:54.00) in CLHDC20/25 on March 13 at $54.20. Sure to be about the money.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 9th (Fr9) over 1609m at Miami Valley Raceway well beaten by Galactic Storm (1:51.30) in SA15000CL on March 8 at $46.60. At the previous start 10th (Fr8) over 1609m at Miami Valley Raceway beaten 35 m by Win Lous Or Draw (1:51.30) in SA40000CL on February 8 at $105.20. Suitably placed and can make amends.

form.formComment: Resumed when over this distance beaten 15 m fourth behind Peace Star in a TM75ORLESS on April 1. Confident of improvement on the first-up effort.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 21 m by Big Skewy (1:52.00) in 15000?CL on April 3 at $29.90. The run previous 7th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, beaten 40 m by Folsom Prison (1:52.30) in 15000?CL on March 20 at $8.50. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Salty Robyn (1:54.10) in 10000?CL on March 27 at $5.50. Two runs back won by 12 m as favourite (Fr3) at this track (1:55.40) beating Dustin Theothers in TM75ORLESS on March 13 at $1.90. Decent effort last start. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 20 run. Last start won by 3 m (Fr6) at this track (1:54.20) beating Wildcat Abby in TM75ORLESS on April 1 at $21.70. This race will be harder than that win. Can't make much of a case.
